english translation text: IF ONLY, ABBAS (AS) HAD NOT BEEN KILLED

urdu transliteration text:
DONO BAZU WO SHAHANE SHAHE WAFA KE THAME
LASHE ABBAS PE SHABBIR BUKA KARTE THE
BHAI TUM BAAD HAMARE JATE
IMAM HOLDS BOTH ARMS OF PRINCE OF LOYALTY
english translation text:
AT THE BODY OF ABBAS, SHABBIR CRIED AND WEPT
O MY BROTHER YOU SHOULD HAVE GONE AFTER ME

urdu transliteration text:
IS TARHA LAGTI NA AKBAR KE KALEJE ME SINA
IS TARHA HOTI NA SADAAT KE KHAYMON ME FUGHAN
YUN NA ZAINAB KE SAHARE JATE
english translation text:
AKBAR WOULD NOT HAVE HAD A SPEAR IN HIS CHEST
THERE WOULD NOT BE THIS WEEPING AND WAILING IN THE TENTS
ZAINAB WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN LEFT WITHOUT ANY SUPPORT

urdu transliteration text:
GARDANE SHAAH PE YUN RAN ME NA KHANJAR CHALTA
YUN NA KHURSHIDE IMAMAT SARE MAQTAL DHALTA
YUN NA SAR NEZON PE SARAY JATAY
english translation text:
HUSAYN WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN SLAUGHTERED
THE SUN OF IMAMAT WOULD NOT HAVE SET IN THE DEATH FIELDS
THE HEADS WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN DISPLAYED ON THE SPEAR

urdu transliteration text:
HOTAY ABBAS DILAWAR TO NA KHAYME JALTE
SHAME GHURBAT NA SAKINA KO TAMACHE LAGTE
GOSHWARE NA UTARE JATE
english translation text:
HAD NOBLE ABBAS SURVIVED TENTS WOULD NOT HAVE BURNT
SAKINA WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN SLAPPED IN SHAME GARIBAN
HER EARINGS WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN SNATCHED

urdu transliteration text:
HOKE PABANDE RASAN SAYYADE SAJJAD CHALAY
NAHR KO DEKH KE ROTE HUWE YE KEHNE LAGE
SAB WATAN SAATH HAMARE JATAY
AS IMAM SAJJAD WAS TIED IN CHAINS AND ROPES
english translation text:
HE LOOKED TOWARDS THE RIVER AND SAID TEARFULLY
I WISH YOU WERE COMING HOME WITH US

urdu transliteration text:
HOTE ABBAS TO CHHINTI NA RIDA ZAINAB KI
PAAON ME ABIDE MUZTAR KE NA BERI DALTI
TAZIYANE BHI NA MARE JATE
english translation text:
IF ABBAS WAS THERE ZAINAB’S VEIL WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN SNATCHED
AABID WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN MADE A PRISONER IN CHAINS
NOR WOULD HE BE LASHED MERCILESSLY

urdu transliteration text:
KABHI CHEHRA KABHI BAZU KABHI SEENA PITA
QAID KHANAY SE WATAN AYI TO ZAINAB NE KAHA
DIN NA YUN GHAM ME GUZARAY JATAY
LAMENTING,BEATING FACES,ARMS AND CHEST
english translation text:
AS ZAINAB RETURNED TO MADINA FROM PRISON SHE SAID
WE WOULD NOT HAVE SEEN THESE TRAUMATIC DAYS

urdu transliteration text:
AAJ BHI AATI HAI YE QABRE SAKINA SE SADA
AY CHACHA AATI NA ZINDAN ME YU HAM KO KAZA
SAATH GHAR HAM BHI TUMHARAY JATAY
english translation text:
FROM THE GRAVE OF SAKINA WE CAN HEAR TODAY
I WOULD NOT HAVE DIED LIKE THIS IN THE PRISON
I WOULD HAVE GONE HOME WITH YOU
